name: BatchNorm
description: Batch normalization over the channel dimension
code:
_bn{{_id}}_gamma = np.ones({{num_features}}, dtype=np.float32)
_bn{{_id}}_beta = np.zeros({{num_features}}, dtype=np.float32)
_bn{{_id}}_axes = tuple(i for i in range({{input}}.ndim) if i != 1)
_bn{{_id}}_mean = np.mean({{input}}, axis=_bn{{_id}}_axes, keepdims=True)
_bn{{_id}}_var = np.var({{input}}, axis=_bn{{_id}}_axes, keepdims=True)
{{output}} = _bn{{_id}}_gamma.reshape(1,-1,*([1]*({{input}}.ndim-2))) * ({{input}} - _bn{{_id}}_mean) / np.sqrt(_bn{{_id}}_var + {{eps}}) + _bn{{_id}}_beta.reshape(1,-1,*([1]*({{input}}.ndim-2)))
